attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WSAR.MANUAL_TRX_KEY  ,              
 WSAR.REPORTED_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUM  ,
 WSAR.RU_BK_SLS_CHANNEL_SRC_TYPE    ,
 WSAR.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD        ,
 WSAR.RU_PRODUCT_KEY                ,
 WSAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT        ,
 WSAR.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD    ,
 WSAR.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD    ,
 WSAR.BASE_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT        ,
 WSAR.SELLING_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT     ,
 WSAR.COST_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT       ,
 WSAR.SALES_CHANNEL_ROLE            ,
 WSAR.PRODUCT_ROLE                  ,
 WSAR.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DTM          ,
 WSAR.SERVICE_TYPE_CD               ,
 WSAR.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_SUBTYPE_CD ,
 WSAR.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD    ,
 WSAR.TRANSACTION_QTY               ,
 WSAR.ORIGINAL_TRANSACTION_ORDER_DT ,
 WSAR.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY        ,
 /*WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUSTOMER_NAME   ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_CITY_NAME  ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_STATE_NAME ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_POSTAL_CD  ,
 WSAR.END_CUSTOMER_ISO_COUNTRY_CD   ,*/
 WSAR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY    ,
 /*WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_TO_CUST_NAME   ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_CITY_NAME ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_STATE_NAME,
 WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_POSTAL_CD ,
 WSAR.SOLD_TO_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD   ,*/
 WSAR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY    ,
 /*WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_TO_CUST_NAME   ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_CITY_NAME ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_STATE_NAME,
 WSAR.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_POSTAL_CD ,
 WSAR.SHIP_TO_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD   ,*/
 WSAR.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 USER,               
 WSAR.START_TV_DTM,
 WSAR.END_TV_DTM,
 WSAR.BK_DEAL_ID,
 WSAR.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,       
 WSAR.SOURCE_TRANSACTION_DT,         
 WSAR.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_USAGE_CD,   
 WSAR.MANUAL_TRX_BOOKING_REVENUE_CD,
 WSAR.APPROVED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 WSAR.UPLOADED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 WSAR.BILL_CUST_PTY_KEY             ,
 /*WSAR.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_NAME       ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_CITY_NAME  ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_STATE_NAME ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_POSTAL_CD  ,
 WSAR.BK_BILL_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD   ,*/
 WSAR.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_1_TXT           ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_2_TXT           ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_3_TXT           ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_4_TXT           ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_5_TXT           ,
 WSAR.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
 WSAR.RESELLER_PO_NUM,
 WSAR.PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
 WSAR.ADJSTMT_INITIATOR_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
 WSAR.SRC_RPTD_ADDITIONAL_CMNT_TXT   ,
 WSAR.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 WSAR.SPECIAL_RUN_PERIOD_END_DT,
 WSAR.CONTRACT_START_DT,
 WSAR.CONTRACT_END_DT   ,
 WSAR.SRC_RPTD_PRDT_ID,
 WSAR.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,
 WSAR.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
 /* ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF Q3FY16 RELEASE */
  WSAR.END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 WSAR.SHIP_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 WSAR.SOLD_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 WSAR.BILL_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY ,
 WSAR.UPLOAD_SOURCE_FILE_NAME,
 WSAR.UPLOAD_SRC_FILE_HEADER_ID_INT ,
 WSAR.FET_PROGRAM_NAME ,
 /*Added below 3 columns as part of Q3FY17*/
 WSAR.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 WSAR.SALES_MOTION_CD,
 WSAR.SUBSCRIPTON_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
 WSAR.RU_NEW_RENEW_DSV_FLG, /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
  WSAR.RU_NEW_RENEW_SOL_KEY, /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
  WSAR.RU_BK_NEW_RENEW_POS_TRX_ID_INT /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
 FROM 
 $$WORKDB.W_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX WSAR
 WHERE DML_TYPE='I'
 AND NOT EXISTS 
 ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX_TV NSAR
 WHERE WSAR.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NSAR.MANUAL_TRX_KEY
 AND WSAR.START_TV_DTM=NSAR.START_TV_DTM)
